data.current_description: Send JSON-encoded data from an external HTTP device to the Thinger.io platform. The data will be stored and can trigger configured actions such as data bucket storage or endpoint forwarding.
data.summary_suggestion: Send JSON data from HTTP device to platform
data.description_suggestion: Sends JSON-encoded data from an external HTTP device to the Thinger.io platform for the specified device. The data is ingested and stored, potentially triggering configured device callbacks such as data bucket storage, endpoint forwarding, or other automated actions. Requires valid device authentication via bearer token or query parameter. Returns a success response (200 OK) if data is accepted. The request body should contain arbitrary JSON matching the device's expected callback data structure.
